review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-073-review-prompt.txt > /tmp/cp00-073-claude-review-output.json

findings.title: Inline upstream gate omitted legal-hold and ethical-wall interaction flags
findings.details: Claude noted that the direct CP00-073 upstream field check did not list secondary_legal_hold_interaction_bound and secondary_ethical_wall_interaction_bound, even though the upstream result validator already enforced them.
findings.recommendation: Add the two flags to the inline upstream completion gate for clarity and defense in depth.

findings.title: command_evidence_ref continues to reference the upstream CP00-072 evidence file
findings.details: Claude observed that the result payload preserves the upstream command_evidence_ref rather than a self-reference. This follows the existing pack chaining convention and is not a runtime or production-readiness blocker.
findings.recommendation: Clarify the self-reference versus upstream-reference convention in a future evidence cleanup boundary if the project wants self-contained result references.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-073 is metadata-only and forward-looking; runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ evaluator calls, security trimming, audit event writes, review queue writes, database/storage/idempotency/lock/product-state writes, and LDIP implementation remain explicitly prohibited.
The only implementation-hardening review finding was fixed before closeout; the remaining finding is an evidence-reference convention deferred with an explicit nonblocking boundary.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-073 ControlPlanePermissionAuditBindingInitialMatrix covers the planned 10 Risk-A units RP00.P06.M04.S14 through RP00.P06.M05.S09, consumes the CP00-072 secondary workflow guard boundary, binds the review-required route, permission matrix row, view/search/mutation/export-download/share/AI-retrieval decisions, audit hint fields, and matched rule capture, and preserves no-write/fail-closed/LDIP-planning-only boundaries.

raw_result.result_excerpt: Verdict APPROVE. P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=2. Blocking findings none. Required fixes none.
